def positive_initializer_requires_half_built_instance_state():
    rule_id = "initializer_requires_half_built_instance_state"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag methods that depend on object fields being patched in after construction before the object becomes usable."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
